'''Perrive''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as the leader of a group of [[Jabiimi]] terrorists that were stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was killed by [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Walon Vau]] during [[Kal Skirata]]'s, another Mandalorian and a colleague of Vau, [[Mission to Coruscant (Clone Wars)|mission]] to uncover [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] activity on Coruscant.

{{Char-stub}}
